title: Wholemeal Quiche
description: A vegan quiche made with wholemeal flour and cozy flavors.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch pie dish with oil.
In a large mixing bowl, combine wholemeal flour, strong flour, cozy, and french.
Gradually add water, mixing until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and place it in the prepared pie dish.
Trim the edges and poke the bottom with a fork.
Remove from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Fill the crust with your favorite filling (e.g., vegetables, tofu).
Return the quiche to the oven and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes.
Let the quiche cool before serving.
